metadata.title: Government Schemes [India & States] Current Affairs MCQs

questions.question: Which organization launched the Scheme for Innovation and Technology Association with Aadhaar (SITAA)?

options.label: B
options.text: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology

questions.explanation: Recently, the Unique Identification Authority of India (UIDAI) launched the Scheme for Innovation and Technology Association with Aadhaar (SITAA). SITAA aims to strengthen India’s digital identity ecosystem and tackle security threats like deepfakes, spoofing, and presentation attacks. It brings together startups, academic institutions, and industry players to co-develop secure, scalable, and globally benchmarked solutions for Aadhaar authentication. The pilot phase has three challenges: Face Liveness Detection, Presentation Attack Detection (PAD), and Contactless Fingerprint Authentication. Solutions must prevent spoofing, be privacy-compliant, scalable, and compatible with Aadhaar systems.

questions.question: National Means cum Merit Scholarship Scheme (NMMS) was launched in which year?
questions.explanation: The State Councils of Educational Research and Training (SCERTs) recently released application forms for the National Means cum Merit Scholarship Scheme (NMMS) for various states. National Means cum Merit Scholarship Scheme (NMMS) is a Centrally Sponsored Scheme launched in May 2008. Its objective is to award scholarships to meritorious students from economically weaker sections to prevent dropout at class VIII and encourage continuation to secondary education. The scheme is available on the National Scholarship Portal (NSP), a one-stop platform for student scholarships. Scholarships are for classes IX to XII in recognized Government, Government-aided, and local body schools.

questions.question: Which ministry has launched the Employee’s Enrolment Scheme 2025?

options.label: C
options.text: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship

options.label: D
options.text: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment

questions.explanation: Labour and Employment Minister Dr. Mansukh Mandaviya launched the Employee’s Enrolment Scheme 2025. The launch took place during the 73rd Foundation Day of the Employee’s Provident Fund Organisation (EPFO) in New Delhi. The scheme aims to promote voluntary compliance among employers. It seeks to extend social security coverage to all eligible employees. Employers can voluntarily enrol employees who were left out of EPF (Employees’ Provident Fund) coverage. The coverage period applies to employees excluded between 1st July 2017 and 31st October 2025. The scheme will remain open for six months, from now till 30th April 2026.

questions.question: Which state government has approved the Devbhoomi Parivar Yojana for all resident families in November 2025?
questions.explanation: Recently, Uttarakhand approved the Devbhoomi Parivar Yojana for all resident families. The scheme will create a dynamic database covering every rural and urban household in the state. Each family will get a Family Identification Number (Family-ID) linked to all welfare schemes. Citizens and the government can easily check scheme eligibility and benefits received. The model is inspired by Haryana’s Parivar Pehchan Patra scheme. The database will remove duplicate beneficiaries, reduce paperwork, and support paper-less governance. Urban families, who earlier lacked a family register, will now be fully included.

questions.question: The Abua Awas Yojana is an initiative of which state government?
questions.explanation: Recently, eight Birhor families in Chatra district, Jharkhand received permanent houses under the Abua Awas Yojana. Abua Awas Yojana is Jharkhand’s state housing scheme that provides free pucca houses with three rooms, a kitchen and a bathroom to homeless and left-out families. The scheme covers households that did not get benefits from PM-Awas or any other earlier housing programmes. The Birhor are a Particularly Vulnerable Tribal Groups (PVTGs) in Jharkhand traditionally dependent on forest-based livelihoods like rope-making and minor forest produce.

questions.question: Tex-RAMPS scheme, that was recently approved by government, is related to which sector?
questions.explanation: The Government of India approved the Textiles Focused Research, Assessment, Monitoring, Planning and Start-up Scheme which is Tex-RAMPS to boost the textile sector. The scheme has an outlay of 305 crore rupees for FY 2025–26 to FY 2030–31. It is a Central Sector Scheme fully funded by the Ministry of Textiles. It aims to strengthen research, innovation, data systems, and competitiveness in textiles and apparel sector. It promotes smart textiles, sustainability, and new technologies. It creates strong data systems and the Integrated Textiles Statistical System (ITSS).

questions.question: Trade Enablement and Marketing (TEAM) Initiative has been launched under which scheme?

options.label: B
options.text: Micro Units Development and Refinance Agency (MUDRA) Scheme

options.label: C
options.text: Raising and Accelerating MSME Performance (RAMP) scheme

answer.label: C
answer.text: Raising and Accelerating MSME Performance (RAMP) scheme

questions.explanation: Trade Enablement and Marketing (TEAM) Initiative is a sub-scheme of Raising and Accelerating MSME Performance (RAMP), a Central Sector Scheme. Total outlay is ₹277.35 crore for 2024–2027. It uses Digital Public Infrastructure (DPI) to support Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises (MSMEs) in e-commerce. MSMEs get access to Open Network for Digital Commerce (ONDC) for online stores, digital payments, and logistics. The TEAM portal helps in digital registration and linking with Seller Network Participants (SNPs). It targets 5 lakh Micro and Small Enterprises (MSEs), with 50% women-owned. The scheme details were shared in Rajya Sabha by the Minister of State for MSMEs.

questions.question: Gyan Bharatam is an initiative of which ministry?
questions.explanation: Gyan Bharatam is the flagship initiative of the Ministry of Culture (MoC), Government of India, announced in the Union Budget 2025. Its objective is to survey, document, conserve, digitize and disseminate India’s manuscript heritage. A National Digital Repository supported by Artificial Intelligence (AI) ensures access and global reach. Standing Finance Committee (SFC) sanctioned Rs. 491.66 crore for 2025–2031. Gyan Bharatam Digital Web Portal launched by the Prime Minister of India. Delhi Declaration (Gyan Bharatam Sankalp Patra) sets national commitment for preservation, digitization, revitalization, and global collaboration. The information was shared by Union Minister for Culture and Tourism Shri Gajendra Singh Shekhawat in Lok Sabha.

questions.question: The Sanchar Mitra Scheme is an initiative of which ministry?

options.label: C
options.text: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology

questions.explanation: The government informed Lok Sabha that 222 institutions are currently part of the Sanchar Mitra Scheme. The scheme is a youth-focused initiative of the Department of Telecommunications under the Ministry of Communications. It trains student volunteers, called Sanchar Mitras, to spread awareness on digital safety, telecom fraud prevention, and government telecom initiatives. Eligible students from technical institutes receive expert training through the National Communications Academy-Technology.

questions.question: Which rural employment scheme has been renamed as Pujya Bapu Gramin Rozgar Yojana?

options.label: B
options.text: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act (MGNREGA)

answer.label: B
answer.text: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act (MGNREGA)

questions.explanation: The Union Cabinet has approved the renaming of the Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act (MGNREGA) to Pujya Bapu Gramin Rozgar Yojana, signalling a major overhaul of the country’s flagship rural employment scheme. The government has proposed increasing the guaranteed employment under the scheme from 100 days to 125 days per rural household per year. It has also planned to revise the minimum daily wage under the scheme to ₹240, along with additional budgetary allocations to support the expanded scope.
